risk_if_not_implemented: Without Sanitization of Personal Data (PD), personal data may be processed without appropriate safeguards, increasing regulatory and reputational risk.

compensating_control_1.name: Secure Disposal, Destruction or Re-Use of Equipment
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to securely dispose of, destroy or repurpose system components using organization-defined techniques and methods to prevent information being recovered from these components.
compensating_control_1.justification: Secure Disposal, Destruction or Re-Use of Equipment (AST-09) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Sanitization of Personal Data (PD) (DCH-09.3) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Data applicability. Given the data-handling focus of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: System Media Sanitization
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to sanitize system media with the strength and integrity commensurate with the classification or sensitivity of the information prior to disposal, release out of organizational control or release for reuse.
compensating_control_2.justification: System Media Sanitization (DCH-09) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Sanitization of Personal Data (PD) (DCH-09.3) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Data applicability. Given the data-handling focus of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
